backstory.original: Wulfgar started his life in the north as the flag bearer of the barbarian Tribe of the Elk. He was bested in the assault on Ten-Towns by Bruenor who decided his punishment would be five years and a day of service. Bruenor grew to love the tall barbarian, eventually seeing him as an adopted son. At the end of his service, Drizzt Do'Urden taught Wulfgar the ways of combat and Bruenor crafted a mighty warhammer, named Aegis-fang. This magical warhammer bears the symbols of three of the Dwarven Gods: Moradin, Clangeddin, and Dumathoin. It is specifically attuned to Wulfgar and magically returns to his hand upon telepathic command.
backstory.display: 沃夫加出生于北方，是野蛮人部落“麋鹿”的旗手。他在攻打十镇时被布鲁诺击败，得到了为其服务五年零一天的惩罚。但随后布鲁诺越来越喜欢这个高大的野蛮人，最终将他视为养子。在他服务期满时，崔斯特·杜垩登向沃夫加传授了战斗技巧，布鲁诺则锻造了一把强大的战锤，命名为艾吉斯之牙。这把神奇的战锤上有矮人族三位神祇的标志：摩拉丁、克兰贾汀和杜马松。它专门为沃夫加而锻造，只要在心中下达指令，战锤就会神奇地回到他手中。

description.original: Wulfgar smashes the nearest group of enemies with his warhammer.
description.display: 沃夫加使用战锤猛击距离最近的一组敌人。

description.original: Shouting the name of his deity, Wulfgar tosses his warhammer, Aegis-fang, at the most distant enemy, dealing damage to and stunning all enemies in a line for 10 seconds.
description.display: 沃夫加呼喊着他所信奉神祇的名字，向距离最远的敌人扔出他的战锤“艾吉斯之牙”，对一条直线上的所有敌人造成伤害，并将他们眩晕 10 秒。

longDescription.original: Shouting the name of his deity, Wulfgar tosses his warhammer, Aegis-fang, at the most distant enemy, dealing damage to and stunning all enemies in a line for 10 seconds.
longDescription.display: 沃夫加呼喊着他所信奉神祇的名字，向距离最远的敌人扔出他的战锤“艾吉斯之牙”，对一条直线上的所有敌人造成伤害，并将他们眩晕 10 秒。

name.original: Critical Hit + Citizen of Icewind Dale
Critical Hit + Citizen of Icewind Dale

description.pre: Wulfgar's base chance to Critical Hit is $(amount)% and his Critical Hits also stun all affected enemies for $(duration___2) seconds.

desc.desc: Additionally, Wulfgar can be used in any Icewind Dale campaign adventure or variant, even if he would not normally be available to be used due to variant or patron restrictions.

description.pre: 沃夫加基础暴击几率为 $(amount)%，他的暴击也会使所有受影响的敌人眩晕 $(duration___2) 秒。

desc.desc: 此外，沃夫加可用于任何冰风谷战役冒险或支线任务，即使以前由于支线任务或赞助者限制条件无法使用。

description.desc: Increases the Health of all other Champions by $amount% of Wulfgar's Max Health
提高所有其他勇士的生命值，数值相当于沃夫加最大生命值的 $amount%。

conditions.desc: Anytime an enemy is stunned, Wulfgar increases the damage of all Champions in the formation by $(not_buffed amount)%, stacking multiplicatively and capping at $max_stacks stacks. When changing areas, 50% of the stacks are lost.

Anytime an enemy is stunned, Wulfgar increases the damage of all Champions in the formation by $(not_buffed amount)%, stacking multiplicatively, capping at $max_stacks stacks, and lasting until the area is changed.
每当敌人被眩晕时，沃夫加使阵型中所有勇士的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，上限为 $max_stacks 层。改变区域时丢失 50% 的堆叠层数。
每当敌人被眩晕时，沃夫加使阵型中所有勇士的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，上限为 $max_stacks 层，并持续到改变区域。

tipText.original: Wulfgar buffs the formation based on how many enemies have been stunned.
tipText.display: 沃夫加根据被眩晕的敌人数量来强化阵型。

description.desc: If Wulfgar stuns a boss, he gains Temporary HP based on the Boss's percent health remaining (at 100% health remanining, he gets $amount% max HP shield)
如果沃夫加眩晕一名首领，则会基于该首领的剩余生命值百分比获得临时生命值（如该首领剩余 100% 生命值，则沃夫加获得 $amount% 最大生命值护盾）

Your formation gains $(amount___2) Mithral Hall stack. Wulfgar increases the damage bonus of Clangeddin's Will by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Mithral Hall stack you have, stacking multiplicatively.
你的阵型获得 $(amount___2) 层秘银厅堆叠。每层秘银厅堆叠均使沃夫加的“克兰贾汀的意志”伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.stack_title: 沃夫加秘银厅堆叠层数

tipText.original: Wulfgar belongs to the Companions of the Hall affiliation and grants the formation a Mithral Hall stack which boosts the abilities of other Companions.
tipText.display: 沃夫加隶属于秘银五侠从属组织，并为阵型提供一层秘银厅堆叠，以增强其他勇士的技能。

description.desc: If Wulfgar attacks an armor-based enemy but doesn't remove a piece of the armor, he increases the damage of all champions in the formation by $(not_buffed amount)% stacking multiplicatively up to $max_stacks times. Stacks reset on area change.
如果沃夫加攻击护甲生命值敌人，但没有移除任意护甲，则使阵型中所有勇士的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，最多叠加 $max_stacks 次。改变区域重置堆叠层数。
Additively increases all Champions' critical hit chances by $amount%.
所有勇士的暴击几率提高 $amount%（加算）。

specializationDescription.original: Wulfgar focuses on increasing the accuracy of the party's attacks, resulting in more critical hits.
specializationDescription.display: 沃夫加专注于提高探险队攻击的精准度，从而造成更多暴击。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Clangeddin's Will by $amount% and only 50% of the stacks are lost on area change.
“克兰贾汀的意志”效果提高 $amount%，并且改变区域时只丢失 50% 的堆叠层数。

specializationDescription.original: Wulfgar focuses on stunned enemies, further boosting the party's damage.
specializationDescription.display: 沃夫加专注于眩晕敌人，进一步提高探险队的伤害。

description.desc: Increases the damage of the Companions of the Hall Champions by $amount%, and all of the Companions of the Hall Champions are available to be used if Icewind Dale is the current campaign, even if they do not currently qualify based on variant or patron restrictions.
秘银五侠的伤害提高 $amount%，并且如果当前战役是冰风谷，则所有秘银五侠勇士均可使用，即使他们目前不符合支线任务或赞助者限制条件的资格。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Wulfgar focuses on his connection with his Companions of the Hall affiliation.
specializationDescription.display: 沃夫加专注于他与秘银五侠从属组织的羁绊

description.original: I would do anything for Catti-brie.
description.display: 我愿意为凯蒂布莉儿做任何事。

description.original: For the north! For the Companions of the Hall!
description.display: 为了北方！为了秘银五侠！

description.original: Any that don't fall from my first swing are yours.
description.display: 但凡没有被我一击消灭的都属于你们。

description.original: Let's see how many I can get in one attack.
description.display: 瞧瞧我一次攻击能干掉几个。

description.original: The might of Clangeddin is behind my warhammer!
description.display: 我的战锤凝聚着克兰贾汀的力量！

description.original: It'll take more than that to take me down!
description.display: 想放倒我，这样可不够！

description.original: If Icingdeath couldn't take me down, how could you?
description.display: 如果冰亡都击不倒我，你又怎么能做到？

description.original: Tempus watches over me, friend.
description.display: 坦帕斯在注视着我，朋友。

description.original: My warhammer has a skill for finding weak points in armor.
description.display: 我的战锤拥有发现盔甲弱点的能力。

description.original: Rage will fuel my warhammer!
description.display: 愤怒将使我的战锤更加强大！

description.original: No armor is perfect forever.
description.display: 没有一件盔甲是完美的。

description.original: It may not be this hit or the next one, but your armor WILL break!
description.display: 这次和下次攻击或许都不成功，但你的盔甲迟早会粉碎！

description.original: They will think twice with me at your side.
description.display: 见到你身边有我，对方得三思而行。

description.original: To me! Make haste!
description.display: 到我身边来！快点！

description.original: ...I should be taller.
description.display: ……我应该长得高一点。

effects.description: Wulfgar also counts as a Dwarf

description.original: We are NOT done yet! This battle is far from over!
description.display: 我们还没完！这场战斗还远没有结束！

description.original: It curves to the right. Make sure to compensate.
description.display: 这武器会偏重向右侧，挥动时记得要平衡一下。

description.original: It returns to my hand every time. It is truly magical.
description.display: 每次挥击后它都会自动回到我手中，真是神奇了。

description.original: It contains the symbols of 3 dwarven gods: Clangeddin, Dumathoin, and Moradin.
description.display: 此战锤上刻有矮人三位神祇的名字：克兰贾汀、杜马松、摩拉丁。

description.original: Crafted by Bruenor Battlehammer himself.
description.display: 由布鲁诺·战锤亲手打造的战锤。

description.original: I found it while exploring one day. It keeps my hair out of my face.
description.display: 这是我某次探险时发现的，可以有效防止头发遮挡住视野。

description.original: I learned much in my time with Bruenor and the dwarves of Mithral Hall.
description.display: 我从布鲁诺和秘银厅的矮人们那里学习到了很多宝贵的知识。

description.original: Clangeddin's symbol rests with weight upon my chest.
description.display: 克兰贾汀的象征沉沉地躺在我胸膛上。

description.original: While no Tempus, the dwarven god of war and valor is an honorable deity to follow.
description.display: 虽然并非坦帕斯，但是矮人的战争与荣耀之神依然是一位值得追随的神明。

description.original: On days when my fingers freeze, I wish this could appear as Aegis-fang does.
description.display: 每当我的指头冷得发麻时，心里就会期盼着这把匕首会像艾吉斯之牙一样出现在我手心。

description.original: Icewind Dale is a harsh environment. A good dagger can save your life.
description.display: 冰风谷是处穷山恶水之地。一把优质的匕首往往是你性命的最大依赖。

description.original: Just don't use it to clean off ore unless you want to spend a tenday sharpening it.
description.display: 千万别用它来切割矿石，否则就等着花几个星期磨刀吧。

description.original: The Tribe of the Elk need sturdy weapons such as this. It is key to their survival.
description.display: 麋鹿部落很需要这种坚固的武器。这对他们的生死存亡至关重要。

description.original: A relic of my first life with the Tribe of the Elk. It still gives me chills.
description.display: 这是我当初在麋鹿部落生活时留下来的纪念品，一看到它我还是忍不住鸡皮疙瘩。

description.original: It has marched across Icewind Dale hundreds of times.
description.display: 此旗帜征战冰风谷各个角落数以百次。

description.original: Make your mark. Mark your home. Defend it with your life.
description.display: 打造自己的旗帜，标记自己的家园，用生命去守护它。

name.original: Banner of the Tribe of the Elk

description.original: I am Wulfgar, Son of Beornegar, of the Tribe of the Elk.
description.display: 我是沃夫加，贝奥尼加之子，来自麋鹿部落。

description.original: Ingeloakastimizilian, the white dragon is more commonly referred to as: Icingdeath.
description.display: 白龙印格罗卡斯提密齐里安有个更加通俗的名称：冰亡。

description.original: I collected these from the corpse of Icingdeath, the white dragon of Icewind Dale.
description.display: 这是我从冰风谷白龙冰亡的尸体上找到的战利品。

description.original: A small reminder of the battle between Drizzt, myself, and Icingdeath
description.display: 这是纪念我和崔斯特恶战冰亡的纪念品。

description.original: To truly understand what we went through, you have to understand true fear.
description.display: 想要了解我们当初的经历，那你首先得面对真正的恐惧。

description.original: Icewind Dale is cold and unforgiving. Stay warm if you want to stay alive.
description.display: 冰风谷的气候雪虐风饕，你要想活下来就必须懂得保暖。

description.original: It still smells of battle.
description.display: 依然存在着战斗的气息。

description.original: The battle against Akar Kessel was the first time I felt truly heroic.
description.display: 当初跟阿卡尔·凯梭的战斗让我首次体验到了英勇的感觉。

description.original: Perhaps someday. . .
description.display: 或许有一天......

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Human Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a STR score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a GOOD alignment

character_sheet_details.backstory: Wulfgar started his life in the north as the flag bearer of the barbarian Tribe of the Elk. He was bested in the assault on Ten-Towns by Bruenor who decided his punishment would be five years and a day of service. Bruenor grew to love the tall barbarian, eventually seeing him as an adopted son. At the end of his service, Drizzt Do'Urden taught Wulfgar the ways of combat and Bruenor crafted a mighty warhammer, named Aegis-fang. This magical warhammer bears the symbols of three of the Dwarven Gods: Moradin, Clangeddin, and Dumathoin. It is specifically attuned to Wulfgar and magically returns to his hand upon telepathic command.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Wulfgar is all about the stuns. Stunning enemies multiple times boosts other Companions of the Hall.

event_upgrades.name: Critical Hit + Citizen of Icewind Dale

character_sheet_details.backstory: 沃夫加出生于北方，是野蛮人部落“麋鹿”的旗手。他在攻打十镇时被布鲁诺击败，得到了为其服务五年零一天的惩罚。但随后布鲁诺越来越喜欢这个高大的野蛮人，最终将他视为养子。在他服务期满时，崔斯特·杜垩登向沃夫加传授了战斗技巧，布鲁诺则锻造了一把强大的战锤，命名为艾吉斯之牙。这把神奇的战锤上有矮人族三位神祇的标志：摩拉丁、克兰贾汀和杜马松。它专门为沃夫加而锻造，只要在心中下达指令，战锤就会神奇地回到他手中。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 沃夫加擅长击晕。击晕敌人多次后会为其他秘银五侠成员提供增益。

display.name: 被丢弃的铁质发夹
display.description: 这是我某次探险时发现的，可以有效防止头发遮挡住视野。

original.name: Steel Hair Clip
original.description: I learned much in my time with Bruenor and the dwarves of Mithral Hall.

display.name: 钢质发夹
display.description: 我从布鲁诺和秘银厅的矮人们那里学习到了很多宝贵的知识。

original.name: Dwarven Hair Clip
original.description: Clangeddin's symbol rests with weight upon my chest.

display.name: 矮人发夹
display.description: 克兰贾汀的象征沉沉地躺在我胸膛上。

original.name: Golden Clangeddin Hair Clip
original.description: While no Tempus, the dwarven god of war and valor is an honorable deity to follow.

display.name: 克兰贾汀黄金发夹
display.description: 虽然并非坦帕斯，但是矮人的战争与荣耀之神依然是一位值得追随的神明。

original.name: Ancient Dagger
original.description: On days when my fingers freeze, I wish this could appear as Aegis-fang does.

display.name: 古老的匕首
display.description: 每当我的指头冷得发麻时，心里就会期盼着这把匕首会像艾吉斯之牙一样出现在我手心。

original.name: Trusty Dagger
original.description: Icewind Dale is a harsh environment. A good dagger can save your life.

display.name: 可靠的匕首
display.description: 冰风谷是处穷山恶水之地。一把优质的匕首往往是你性命的最大依赖。

original.name: Balanced Dagger
original.description: Just don't use it to clean off ore unless you want to spend a tenday sharpening it.

display.name: 协调的匕首
display.description: 千万别用它来切割矿石，否则就等着花几个星期磨刀吧。

original.name: Dagger of the Elk
original.description: The Tribe of the Elk need sturdy weapons such as this. It is key to their survival.

display.name: 麋鹿匕首
display.description: 麋鹿部落很需要这种坚固的武器。这对他们的生死存亡至关重要。

original.name: Torn Banner
original.description: A relic of my first life with the Tribe of the Elk. It still gives me chills.

display.name: 撕裂的旗帜
display.description: 这是我当初在麋鹿部落生活时留下来的纪念品，一看到它我还是忍不住鸡皮疙瘩。

original.name: Wind-Scarred Banner
original.description: It has marched across Icewind Dale hundreds of times.

display.name: 风蚀旗帜
display.description: 此旗帜征战冰风谷各个角落数以百次。

original.name: Tribal Banner
original.description: Make your mark. Mark your home. Defend it with your life.

display.name: 部落旗帜
display.description: 打造自己的旗帜，标记自己的家园，用生命去守护它。

original.name: Banner of the Tribe of the Elk
original.description: I am Wulfgar, Son of Beornegar, of the Tribe of the Elk.

display.name: 麋鹿部落的旗帜
display.description: 我是沃夫加，贝奥尼加之子，来自麋鹿部落。

original.name: Shards of Dragon Scales
original.description: Ingeloakastimizilian, the white dragon is more commonly referred to as: Icingdeath.

display.name: 龙鳞碎片
display.description: 白龙印格罗卡斯提密齐里安有个更加通俗的名称：冰亡。

original.name: Trinkets of Icingdeath
original.description: I collected these from the corpse of Icingdeath, the white dragon of Icewind Dale.

display.name: 冰亡的小饰品
display.description: 这是我从冰风谷白龙冰亡的尸体上找到的战利品。

original.name: Dragon Scale Bracelet
original.description: A small reminder of the battle between Drizzt, myself, and Icingdeath

display.name: 龙鳞手镯
display.description: 这是纪念我和崔斯特恶战冰亡的纪念品。

original.name: Icingdeath Bracer
original.description: To truly understand what we went through, you have to understand true fear.

display.name: 冰亡护腕
display.description: 想要了解我们当初的经历，那你首先得面对真正的恐惧。

original.name: Worn Wolf Cloak
original.description: Icewind Dale is cold and unforgiving. Stay warm if you want to stay alive.

display.name: 陈旧的狼皮斗篷
display.description: 冰风谷的气候雪虐风饕，你要想活下来就必须懂得保暖。

original.name: New Wolf Cloak
original.description: It still smells of battle.

display.name: 崭新的狼皮斗篷
display.description: 依然存在着战斗的气息。

original.name: Ten-Towns Cloak
original.description: The battle against Akar Kessel was the first time I felt truly heroic.

display.name: 十镇斗篷
display.description: 当初跟阿卡尔·凯梭的战斗让我首次体验到了英勇的感觉。

original.name: Chieftain's Cloak
original.description: Perhaps someday. . .

display.name: 酋长的斗篷
display.description: 或许有一天......

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
使所有男性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Human Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位人类勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a STR score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有力量大于等于 15 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有魅力大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a GOOD alignment
阵型中每有一位善良阵营勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
